## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 29, 2026 - May 29, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Bry.864_, May 29, 2026, 5/5: "This app has helped me so much and I think this is the best app simple no adds and with premium it’s amazing. I already have it but this update you just did is a bit laggy I wanted to make a comment about the update.. the change in features are good in 5.6.3 hut after I downloaded it lag instantly when you open the app. There is something wrong with the background but keep it up keep adding support, I have adhd and this does help me a lot thank you."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 17, 2026 - May 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Rybodatkid_, May 17, 2026, 1/5: "They renew it before the week is up and buy the most expensive version of it so you’re stuck with it a whole year! Woke up the morning I subscribed to it to turn it off because it’s not a very good app and they renewed me for a whole year!"
